data.body: ALL 11 WORKSTREAMS LANDED + CLOSED (each with completion-verifier + plan-review attestations). WS10 (glad-gloom-bog) LANDED: commit b4e70a551 — R-3 asymmetric-error invariant + tuning checklist in plan-review-gate.md; R-5 generated criteria authoring guide (docs/plan-review-criteria-guide.md) + parity check folded into validate-routing; rebar explain <id> across CLI (main() intercept) + MCP (_mcp_reads read tool) + library (registry.explain_criterion, one shared lookup) with 3 error states tested; REBAR_DOCS_URL config helper; coach guide_url deep-links (#<criterion-id>). Full stack (11 commits, oldest->newest): WS1 4f20635dd, WS6 723f30f1c, WS7 f0b736ce8, WS2 af2f4df01, WS3 0c89397cc, WS11 0b73ea24e, WS4 47307af01, WS5 277480d6f, WS8 85aa654eb, WS9 54fa128fa, WS10 b4e70a551 — all based on 6a28e9a5a; rebasing onto current main b1927e2a (only 2 files overlap: CONTRIBUTING.md + _cli/__init__.py) for the Gerrit stacked-changes landing. All 11 children closed+certified via parent_id under epic 9f78-ccbf-9248-4097.
